mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.type, p.breed, p.gender, p.birthday, p.weight, p.color, p.avatar, p.description, p.is_default, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pet_profile p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_default DESC, p.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM pet_profile p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_default = 1 AND p.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM pet_profile p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status = 1
AND p.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_profile (user_id, name, type, breed, gender, birthday, weight, color, avatar, description, is_default, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{breed}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{weight}, #{color}, #{avatar}, #{description}, #{isDefault}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE pet_profile
name = #{name}, type = #{type}, breed = #{breed}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, weight = #{weight}, color = #{color}, avatar = #{avatar}, description = #{description}, is_default = #{isDefault},
user_id = #{userId},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pet_profile SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pet_profile SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE pet_profile SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_profile WHERE status = 1
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM pet_profile WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY type
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_profile WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM pet_profile WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND status = 1 GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT name FROM pet_profile WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as male, SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as female, SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 0 OR gender IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unknown FROM pet_profile WHERE status = 1
